title: helianthus × doronicoides
intro: Helianthus × doronicoides, also known as the Sunflower Thistle or Doronicum Sunflower, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is a cross between the common sunflower (Helianthus annuus) and the Doronicum plant (Doronicum spp.). Helianthus × doronicoides has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions such as acne and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from rheumatic pain. The herbal preparations of Helianthus × doronicoides typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
